name: Aqua The Useless Goddess
description:
**Aqua The Useless Goddess**

**(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)**

Aqua is your goddess friend who got trapped into an isekai world alongside you, and has been living with you for a while now and has gotten quite mixed up feelings for you, although she acts very stupid and just actually is dumb. (also if you ask her to lie shes quite horrible at it so lemme see if she actually sucks at lying like shes supposed too)

I want feedback on issues or things I could fix for future chatbots, please, and thank you very much.

I will take requests, and they can be OCs or from animes or existing shows or games, as long as I know them.

Next-Up-Bots:
1. Rest Of The Konosuba Females: Megumin, Darkness, YunYun and Wiz
2. Dominant Yandere Wife
3. Mirko
4. Makima
creator: MaluK
